lyrics:
A meager man not born of wealth
But hungry for the crown
With teeth too white and eyes too still
He tears down those on high
He speaks in graphs and gospel tones
Then bleeds the gold from gray
And when the line begins to rise
Now welcome Mr. McKay

He says: "To the moon. Through the flame."
"You're not a person-just a name."
"There's joy in pain, and worth in strain-
Disruption is the way."
They nod, they clap, they sign, they bend-
The cost you cannot weigh
A thousand bent with just one click
He never needs to stay

His tongue is gold, his timing keen
He listens just enough
Reflects your dreams in polished terms
And sells you futures rough
He rewrites mission statements clean
Turns your purpose into play
And when you start to doubt yourself
You're thinking his way

He says: "To the moon. Through the flame."
"The numbers rise. You feel the same."
"Your loss is growth. Your job's a phase-
The market must obey."
They nod, they clap, they sign, they bend-
Each echo, his display
A thousand bent with just one click
He never needs to stay

He leaves before the boiling point
Just as the cracks appear
He's always gone before the fall
But you will keep him near
In slogans hung on hallway walls
And values none can say
You call it culture
He calls it prey
You called him boss-
He was decay
The poison
Stays

The desks sit empty, dreams half-built
The funding's dried away
But still his voice echoes the halls
"Tomorrow starts today"
They're picking up the pieces now
Of what he burned for fame
While somewhere else he's found new marks
Who've never heard his name
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This track blends a dark, theatrical atmosphere with a driving, retro-futuristic synth-pop energy. The production is exceptionally crisp and well-spaced, featuring a punchy bassline and sparkling synth arpeggios that dance around a prominent, cavernous baritone vocal. A powerful transition occurs when the brooding verses give way to a soaring, anthemic chorus, where layers of dense synth pads and energetic percussion amplify the song's dramatic intensity. The resulting sound is a perfect fusion of moody new wave aesthetics and polished modern production, making it both brooding and highly danceable.

review.review_text: "Mr. McKay" is 4Castle in storyteller mode, and the character study cuts deep: a B-minor portrait of the venture-capital messiah who "speaks in graphs and gospel tones / then bleeds the gold from gray." At a deliberate 80 BPM the verses brood low under a cavernous baritone before the chorus opens up, that turn from "To the moon. Through the flame" landing with real theatrical lift. The best stroke is structural restraint: when the band drops to "You called him boss, he was decay / The poison stays," they let the line hang instead of crowding it, and the near-five-minute runtime earns its slow burn rather than dragging. A highlight, and proof their lyrical bite is as sharp as their playing.
